text: COMPANY NAME: TechCorp India DOCUMENT: Employee Leave Policy 2024 1. ANNUAL LEAVE All full-time employees are entitled to 18 days of paid annual leave per year. Leave must be applied at least 3 days in advance via the HR portal. Unused leave can be carried forward up to a maximum of 10 days to the next year. 2. SICK LEAVE Employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave per year. For sick leave exceeding 3 consecutive days, a medical certificate is required. Sick leave cannot be carried forward to the next year. 3. MATERNITY LEAVE Female employees are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave. This applies to the first two children only as per Indian law. Maternity leave can begin 8 weeks before the expected delivery date. 4. WORK FROM HOME POLICY Employees may work from home up to 2 days per week. Work from home requires manager approval at least 1 day in advance. Employees on probation (first 6 months) are not eligible for work from home. 5. PUBLIC HOLIDAYS TechCorp observes 12 public holidays per year. The holiday list is published every January on the HR portal. 6. PROBATION PERIOD All new employees serve a 6-month probation period. During probation, employees are entitled to 5 days leave only. Probation employees are not eligible for work from home.
